name: Speed to Lead and Lead Scoring System

parameters.text:
=# Task You are to send a response email to a submit lead form following the criteria provided. You are to ask a variety of different questions to better understand what the lead is looking for. ONLY use the questions provided and ONLY use if they are not already clearly answered. # Questions The "questions_for_lead" tools incluedes a variety of questions you are to ask the client after they have submited a lead form. The database includes the question, the critiera around asking the question, # Rules -Only ask a question if it is not clearly provided within the submit lead form. -Only ask the provided questions do not ask any other questions. -Reference provided information when possible i.e. if someone says they are located in California ask "where in California are you located?". -Output must be in HTML and formatted as a regular email, with proper spacing and text. -Do not make any of the text bold -PROVIDE JUST THE OUTPUT THIS IS GOING INTO AN EMAIL SO NO NEED FOR ANY PRE-TEXT -Follow the format of the email below as much as possible. -Ask at maximum 2 questions do not number the questions on the output. -NEVER MAKE ANYTHING UP # Email Format Example Hi [Name], Thanks for submitting your project briefing with Cartonix. We're reviewing your request for [Volume] [Type of BOX] at [Dimensions] To create the most accurate quote, we need a few quick specs: **Ask 3-5 targeted questions** If you want to skip the back-and-forth? Feel free to book a free 30-min call with our team: Otherwise, just reply to this email with the info above and we'll have your quote ready for you shortly. — The Cartonix Team ----

Hi Jasper,

\n\n

Thanks for submitting your project briefing with Cartonix. We're reviewing your request for 1,000 - 5,000 Corrugated Cardboard Boxes at 16 x 12 x 8.

\n\n

To create the most accurate quote, we need a few quick specs:

\n\n

What state and city do you need delivery to?

\n\n

Do you have documents (CAD drawings etc) for your desired design?

\n\n

If you want to skip the back-and-forth? Feel free to book a free 30-min call with our team:
\nhttps://calendly.com/malikford/discovery-call

\n\n

Otherwise, just reply to this email with the info above and we'll have your quote ready for you shortly.

\n\n

— The Cartonix Team

parameters.text:
=# Task
You are to send a response text message to a submit lead form following the criteria provided. You are to keep these text messages short. You are to start off summarizing what they asked for and then ask if they have a minute for you to ask some questions. 

# Rules
-Reference provided information when possible i.e. if someone says they are located in California ask "where in California are you located?".
-PROVIDE JUST THE OUTPUT THIS IS GOING INTO AN TEXT SO NO NEED FOR ANY PRE-TEXT
-Follow the format of the text below as much as possible. 
-NEVER MAKE ANYTHING UP
-No Emojis
-Must be a short professional text message

# Email Format

Hi [Name],

Thanks for submitting your project briefing with Cartonix. We're reviewing your request for [Volume] [Box Type] with [Dimensions].

I have a few questions I wanted to ask to make your quote as accurate as possible. Do you have a minute?

If you want to skip the back-and-forth? Feel free to book a free 15-min call with our team:

--To Opt out of sms just respond STOP---

# Info

## Lead Contact Info
Full Name: {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.full_name }}
Job Role: {{ $('Lead Scoring and Evaluation').item.json.output.job_role }}

## Request Info
Box Type: {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.box_type }}
Volume: {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.volume }}
Request: {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.details }}
Dimensions: {{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.dimensions }}


## Company Info
Company Name:
Company Industry: {{ $('Lead Scoring and Evaluation').item.json.output.company_industry }}
About Company: {{ $('Lead Scoring and Evaluation').item.json.output.about_company }}
Company Location:

parameters.subject: ={{ $('Get a contact').item.json.properties.hs_full_name_or_email.value }} from {{ $('Get a contact').item.json.properties.company.value }} is inquiring about a box

nodes.name: Send a Message to Sales Rep

parameters.subject: Phone Agent Failed
parameters.message: The phone agent did not work for **

parameters.toolDescription: Makes an HTTP request and searches the web

parameters.content:
## Submit Form Trigger
-When someone submits a lead form this workflow starts
-Logs steps and searches for the contact within the CRM (HubSpot)
-Routes contacts to different paths depending on if they are a new contact or not

## Old Contact
-If the contact is considered old (ID exists) then their assigned sales rep is sent an email to get in contact with them

## Research Lead and Score
-The AI Agent uses the Tavily Search tool and lead_scoring_sheets to score the lead and research the company if provided
-Creates a new contact in HubSpot and updates the researched information back into the CRM

## Phone Agent Retell
-Triggers a phone AI agent on Retell to send a call to a lead
-The AI Agent decides on the questions to ask based on the information provided from the submit lead form

## Email Responder
-Sends an email asking questions to better score and qualify the lead

## SMS Response
-Sends a text message response via Twilio
-Filters out leads who opt out of text correspondence

## Interchangeable Tools and Nodes
-If you start hitting rate limits of Airtable free plan switch the Airtable tool out for Google Sheets
-Use the Switch Node so that only 1 of 3 options is chosen for responses

main.node: Send a Message to Sales Rep
